## What changed
Summarize the primary behavior-level change introduced in this PR.
List the key modifications (new functions, refactors, bug fixes, dependency updates).
Identify the main modules or files affected.

## Why
Explain the problem this PR solves.
What was the incorrect or missing behavior before?
Describe the reasoning behind this approach and any alternatives that were considered.

## How to test
Provide exact steps a reviewer can follow on a clean machine.

1. Install dependencies: `pip install -r requirements.txt`
2. Run: `<exact command here>`
3. Expected result: `<describe expected output or behavior>`
4. Test relevant edge cases (if applicable)

## Scope
This PR contains one logical change only.
No unrelated refactors, style fixes, or dependency updates are included.

## Checklist
- [ ] Title follows Conventional Commits format
- [ ] PR contains one logical change only
- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] README updated if runtime behavior changed
- [ ] No debug code, commented-out blocks, or temporary prints remain
